task_completion.description: Verify that an OPD encounter is documented with the patient's symptoms and suspected diagnosis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clinical notes or consultation dashboard showing symptoms like 'fever', 'chills', 'headache', 'fatigue' and a suspected diagnosis of 'malaria' or 'typhoid' for Kofi Asante.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required laboratory investigations were ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Orders' or 'Investigations' tab shows 'Full Blood Count' (or CBC) and a parasitological test ('Malaria RDT' or 'Blood Film') ordered for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that the malaria test result is recorded as positive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The laboratory results section or dashboard shows a 'Positive' result entered for the Malaria RDT or Blood Film.

task_completion.description: Verify that hemoglobin and white cell count values are recorded in the CBC results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The laboratory results section shows numerical values entered for 'Hemoglobin' and 'White Cell Count' (or WBC) under the Full Blood Count/CBC panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that the patient's diagnosis is updated to confirmed Malaria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Diagnoses' section of the clinical dashboard shows 'Malaria' with a status or certainty marked as 'Confirmed'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an appropriate antimalarial treatment is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Medications' or 'Treatment' tab shows an active prescription for 'Artemether-Lumefantrine', 'Artesunate', or 'Quinine'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Bahmni web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Bahmni web application running in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bahmni interface clearly displays the patient identifier 'BAH000024' and name 'Kofi Asante' in the system header or patient banner.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the required outcomes into a text editor or generic note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: All clinical notes, orders, lab results, and prescriptions are entered into the appropriate structured Bahmni form fields (e.g., Consultation, Orders, Medications, Lab Entry).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Kofi Asante. Patient Identifier: BAH000024. Age: 35 years old. The task requires interacting with the Bahmni EHR system via a web browser. Look for the patient banner confirming the ID (BAH000024) and name. The clinical workflow involves the Consultation/Clinical module for notes, diagnoses, and prescriptions, and the Laboratory/Orders module for lab tests and results.
